ddls:
CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* Reference to the location where the warehouse is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_usage" INTEGER /* Current usage of the warehouse capacity */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate conditions of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "part_id" TEXT /* Part ID of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "status_eff_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the product's current status */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the product */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check for the product */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "status_eff_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the status */,
  "status_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the status ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispatches" (
  "dispatch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispatch event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being dispatched */,
  "dispatch_date" TEXT /* Date of the dispatch */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products dispatched */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the dispatch */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transport used */,
  "dispatched_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who dispatched the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispatch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispatches_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispatches_dispatched_by FOREIGN KEY ("dispatched_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being received */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date of the receipt */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of products received */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the receipt */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transport used */,
  "received_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who received the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_received_by FOREIGN KEY ("received_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "price_eff_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the price */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "price_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the price ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse manager, inventory analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
